entities.name: SORGHUM SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A pest (Atherigona soccata) causing substantial economic losses in sorghum globally

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The host plant affected by the sorghum shoot fly

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Management measures used for mitigating losses caused by sorghum shoot fly

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist attack by the sorghum shoot fly

entities.name: LEAF GLOSSINESS
entities.description: A morphological marker used for selecting genotypes with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: LEAF SHEATH PIGMENTATION
entities.description: A morphological marker used for selecting genotypes with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: PERCENTAGE PLANTS WITH SHOOT FLY DEADHEARTS
entities.description: A morphological marker used for selecting genotypes with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: NUMBER OF SHOOT FLY EGGS PER PLANT
entities.description: A morphological marker used for selecting genotypes with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of total soluble sugars, protein, and tannin contents

entities.name: TOTAL SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: A biochemical trait associated with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A biochemical trait where lower content is associated with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: TANNIN CONTENTS
entities.description: A biochemical trait associated with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: GC-MS
entities.description: Gas Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry used to identify compounds associated with resistance or susceptibility to shoot fly

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE CHEMICALS
entities.description: Chemical compounds on the leaf surface used as markers for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: CONDENSED TANNINS
entities.description: A biochemical compound associated with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: PHENOLS
entities.description: A biochemical compound associated with resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: HPLC ANALYSIS
entities.description: High-Performance Liquid Chromatography used to analyze protocatechuic and coumaric acids

entities.name: PROTOCATECHUIC ACID
entities.description: A biochemical compound found in significantly greater amounts in resistant sorghum genotypes

entities.name: COUMARIC ACID
entities.description: A biochemical compound found in significantly greater amounts in resistant sorghum genotypes

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at utilizing resistant genotypes to improve crop resilience

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental condition during which genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: POST RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental condition during which genotypes were evaluated
